title: SMP++
description: A Survival Multiplayer Minecraft Modpack for Fabric Users
body:
The purpose of this modpack is to add to the vanilla a **new environment, better graphics, mods and shaders** to let you enjoy the game in a better way.
I started this modpack with the intention to make a vanilla SMP with my friends with a better everything, it even uses some mods from Lunar Client, and i think they combine perfectly, it has, in my opinion, some of the best mods and we cant forget the texture packs that comes with it.

_**Mods** that are right now installed in **2.0**_:
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Feautres
- 3d Skin Layers
- Architectury API
- Armored Elytra
- Clean F3
- Cloth Config API
- Continuity
- Dinamic Lights
- Entity Culling 
- Fabric API
- Fabric language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Iris Shaders
- JourneyMap
- Lithium
- Make Bubbles Pop
- MidnightLib
- ModMenu
- MoreCulling
- Noisium
- Reese's Sodium Option
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Text Placeholder API
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Freecam

_**Texture Packs** that are installed from **1.0.0**_:
- 3D crops Revamped
- Better Flame Particles
- Better Lanterns
- Simple 3D Chain
- Better hoppers
- Chests Reimagined
- Eating Animation Resource Pack
- Fresh Animations
- ic's Better Enchantments Pack
- Mace but 3D
- No Pumpkin Blur
- Ore Frames
- Overdetailed Saplings
- RAY's 3D Ladders
- RAY's 3D Rails
- Remodeled Doors 3D
- Small Shield & Totem

_Mods from **Lunar Client** that i use_:
- 1.7 Visuals
- FPS
- Toggle Sneak/Sprint
- Zoom
- Armor Status
- Coordinates
- Day Counter
- Potion Effects
- Chat
- NameTags
- Shulker Preview
- Scrollable Tooltips
- Saturation
- Color Saturation
- Item Physics
- Screenshot Uploader
- Boss Bar
- Freelook
- Menu Blur
- WAILA
- Horse Stats

_**DataPacks** that are installed in **2.0**_:
- Tree Vein Miner

_**Shaders** that are good with this pack starting from **1.0.0**_:
- [Sildur's Enhanced Default v1.171 Fancy](https://sildurs-shaders.github.io/downloads/)
